name_en: 💖【With full original green box packaging】💖【New Arrival】G brand logo symbols are reinterpreted in different ways every season. The new double G pattern design is bold and eye-catching. This handbag features a handle design and can be worn crossbody. It gives classic materials a modern touch, paired with imported cowhide hardware that is polished to match, with clear texture and fine quality.
name_cn:
💖【With full original green box packaging】💖【New Arrival】G brand logo symbols are reinterpreted in different ways every season. The new double G pattern design is bold and eye-catching. This handbag features a handle design and can be worn crossbody. It gives classic materials a modern touch, paired with imported cowhide hardware that is polished to match, with clear texture and fine quality.
Model: 815714.
Dimensions: 27(L) x 17(H) x 7cm(D)
Color: Canvas Brown Leather / Original Leather.
Made in Italy
